title: Parking Enforcement Workers
description: Patrol assigned area, such as public parking lot or city streets to issue tickets to overtime parking violators and illegally parked vehicles.

tasks.text: Enter and retrieve information pertaining to vehicle registration, identification, and status, using hand-held computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patrol an assigned area by vehicle or on foot to ensure public compliance with existing parking ordinance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write warnings and citations for illegally parked vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Appear in court at hearings regarding contested traffic citations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain assigned equipment and supplies, such as hand-held citation computers, citation books, rain gear, tire-marking chalk, and street cones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to and make radio dispatch calls regarding parking violations and complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain close communications with dispatching personnel, using two-way radios or cell phones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform simple vehicle maintenance procedures, such as checking oil and gas, and report mechanical problems to supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and report hazardous conditions, such as missing traffic signals or signs, and street markings that need to be repainted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify vehicles in violation of parking codes, checking with dispatchers when necessary to confirm identities or to determine whether vehicles need to be booted or towed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train new or temporary staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make arrangements for illegally parked or abandoned vehicles to be towed, and direct tow-truck drivers to the correct vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate and answer complaints regarding contested parking citations, determining their validity and routing them appropriately.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information to the public regarding parking regulations and facilities, and the location of streets, buildings and points of interest.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain required records, including logs of parking enforcement activities, and records of contested citations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform traffic control duties such as setting up barricades and temporary signs, placing bags on parking meters to limit their use, or directing traffic.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mark tires of parked vehicles with chalk and record time of marking, and return at regular intervals to ensure that parking time limits are not exceeded.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Locate lost, stolen, and counterfeit parking permits, and take necessary enforcement action.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect coins deposited in meters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wind parking meter clocks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to motorists needing help with problems, such as flat tires, keys locked in cars, or dead batteries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign and review the work of subordinates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
